states.name: Sun Wukong
states.title: The Great Sage, Heaven's Equal
states.description: Sun Wukong is a mountain rogue, and all the mountain animals are her underlings. However, at first, she was just a weak little child, abandoned by her parents. And the Monkey God up on the mountain just couldn't leave her like that, so he took her in and raised her. Now she has grown pretty big, but her curiosity is even bigger, so she was sent on a journey with a new Master called Tang Sanzang.

states.name: Sun Wukong
states.title: The Great Sage, Heaven's Equal
states.description: During the journey, some bandits targeted Master Sanzang. But that's exactly what Sun Wukong the bodyguard is for! She hadn't been raised by the Monkey God for nothing. She rounded the bad guys up in no time, with the techniques learned from the Monkey God and her trusty size-changing staff. At first glance, it looks like she's unbeatable, but the truth is, even she has a weak point...

states.name: Sun Wukong
states.title: The Great Sage, Heaven's Equal
states.description: "Ouch. ouch, ouch... I'm sorry, Master, I won't do that again..." Here's Sun Wukong's only weakness—the magical headband that Master Sanzang put on her head. When she does something bad, Master just says a word and the headband goes squeeeeze! Tsk tsk, poor Sun Wukong. She probably agreed to go on the journey so that she can have this headband removed... No, that's not true. When she was a child, the mountain might have been her entire world, but once she grew up, it wasn't enough anymore, so she went travelling to see the wide, wide world. And her journey has only just begun.
